description: You are a content operations specialist preparing a documentary video for a video-on-demand (VOD) platform. Using the source video at /home/ga/Videos/documentary_computing.mp4 and chapter metadata in /home/ga/Documents/chapter_sheet.txt, create four deliverables in /home/ga/Videos/vod_package/: a chaptered video named documentary_chaptered.mp4 with 6 embedded chapter markers; six chapter thumbnail images named chapter_1.png through chapter_6.png (minimum 320x180 resolution) captured from each segment; a JSON file named chapter_index.json containing an array of 6 chapter objects with keys for chapter_number, title, start_time_sec, end_time_sec, description, and thumbnail_file; and a scrub-preview sprite sheet named scrub_preview.png (approx 960x270) containing a 6x3 grid of timeline thumbnails. Ensure all metadata exactly matches the provided chapter sheet.
